channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-7150] sanity-hsm test_250: Copytool failed to stop in 20s
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for wangdi <di.wang@intel.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.hpdd.intel.com/test_sets/e76c2db6-5a1d-11e5-b0a5-5254006e85c2.

The sub-test test_250 failed with the following error:

Copytool failed to stop in 20s ...

Similar as LU-6203, but on different test.

Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl mark == sanity-hsm test 250: Coordinator max request == 10:19:59 \(1442139599\)
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: == sanity-hsm test 250: Coordinator max request == 10:19:59 (1442139599)
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n mdt.lustre-MDT0000.hsm.max_requests
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl set_param mdt.lustre-MDT0000.hsm_control=disabled
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n mdt.lustre-MDT0000.hsm_control
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n mdt.lustre-MDT0000.hsm_control
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl set_param mdt.lustre-MDT0000.hsm_control=enabled
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n mdt.lustre-MDT0000.hsm_control
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n mdt.lustre-MDT0000.hsm_control
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n			mdt.lustre-MDT0000.hsm.actions |			grep STARTED | grep -v CANCEL | wc -l
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl get_param			mdt.lustre-MDT0000.hsm.actions |			grep WAITING | wc -l
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n			mdt.lustre-MDT0000.hsm.actions |			grep STARTED | grep -v CANCEL | wc -l
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl get_param			mdt.lustre-MDT0000.hsm.actions |			grep WAITING | wc -l
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n			mdt.lustre-MDT0000.hsm.actions |			grep STARTED | grep -v CANCEL | wc -l
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl get_param			mdt.lustre-MDT0000.hsm.actions |			grep WAITING | wc -l
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n			mdt.lustre-MDT0000.hsm.actions |			grep STARTED | grep -v CANCEL | wc -l
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl get_param			mdt.lustre-MDT0000.hsm.actions |			grep WAITING | wc -l

Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl get_param			mdt.lustre-MDT0000.hsm.actions |			grep WAITING | wc -l
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n			mdt.lustre-MDT0000.hsm.actions |			grep STARTED | grep -v CANCEL | wc -l
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl get_param			mdt.lustre-MDT0000.hsm.actions |			grep WAITING | wc -l
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n			mdt.lustre-MDT0000.hsm.actions |			grep STARTED | grep -v CANCEL | wc -l
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl get_param			mdt.lustre-MDT0000.hsm.actions |			grep WAITING | wc -l

Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl get_param			mdt.lustre-MDT0000.hsm.actions |			grep WAITING | wc -l
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n			mdt.lustre-MDT0000.hsm.actions |			grep STARTED | grep -v CANCEL | wc -l
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl get_param			mdt.lustre-MDT0000.hsm.actions |			grep WAITING | wc -l

Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl get_param			mdt.lustre-MDT0000.hsm.actions |			grep WAITING | wc -l
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n			mdt.lustre-MDT0000.hsm.actions |			grep STARTED | grep -v CANCEL | wc -l
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl get_param			mdt.lustre-MDT0000.hsm.actions |			grep WAITING | wc -l
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n			mdt.lustre-MDT0000.hsm.actions |			grep STARTED | grep -v CANCEL | wc -l
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl get_param			mdt.lustre-MDT0000.hsm.actions |			grep WAITING | wc -l
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n			mdt.lustre-MDT0000.hsm.actions |			grep STARTED | grep -v CANCEL | wc -l
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl get_param			mdt.lustre-MDT0000.hsm.actions |			grep WAITING | wc -l
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n			mdt.lustre-MDT0000.hsm.actions |			grep STARTED | grep -v CANCEL | wc -l
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl get_param			mdt.lustre-MDT0000.hsm.actions |			grep WAITING | wc -l
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n			mdt.lustre-MDT0000.hsm.actions |			grep STARTED | grep -v CANCEL | wc -l
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl get_param			mdt.lustre-MDT0000.hsm.actions |			grep WAITING | wc -l
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n			mdt.lustre-MDT0000.hsm.actions |			grep STARTED | grep -v CANCEL | wc -l
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl get_param			mdt.lustre-MDT0000.hsm.actions |			grep WAITING | wc -l
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl mark  sanity-hsm test_250: @@@@@@ FAIL: Copytool failed to stop in 20s ... 
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: sanity-hsm test_250: @@@@@@ FAIL: Copytool failed to stop in 20s ...
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl dk > /logdir/test_logs/2015-09-13/lustre-reviews-el6_7-x86_64--review-dne-part-2--1_7_1__34547__-69992805865640-020358/sanity-hsm.test_250.debug_log.$(hostname -s).1442139767.log;
         dmesg > /logdir/test_logs/2015-09-13/lustre-reviews
item.summary: sanity-hsm test_250: Copytool failed to stop in 20s

status.description: The issue is considered finished, the resolution is correct. Issues which are closed can be reopened.
